params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, ForecastQuantity FROM ForecastingItem WHERE ForecastingTypeId = '0DbW7000001ZgGjKAK' AND PeriodId = '{{JS_Config.getForecastPeriodId()}}' AND ForecastingItemCategory = 'MostLikelyForecast' AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClauseWithManagers()}}) LIMIT 50
